message:
refactor: improve governance gates, extension host lifecycle, module resolver, and superblock validation

Broad improvements across existing franken-engine and franken-extension-host
modules spanning three categories:

Functional enhancements:
- superblock_formation: Add profile validation with two new rejection reasons
  (CandidateProfileMismatch, MissingDeoptContinuations) to verify candidate
  opcodes match quickening profiles before compilation
- module_resolver: Refactor external_referrer_directory() to properly handle
  scoped package names (@org/pkg), module file extensions (.mjs/.cjs/.js),
  and subpath normalization; add is_module_file_name() and
  strip_module_file_extension() helpers
- extension host: Distinguish operational vs authority-level lifecycle checks
  by splitting ensure_running_for() into ensure_operational_for() (allows
  Running/Suspending/Terminating) and ensure_running_for_authority() (Running
  only); add lifetime and authority guards to approve_capability_escrow_request()
  and issue_emergency_capability_grant()
- esm_cjs_interop_parity: Introduce EvidenceHashInput struct to reduce
  parameter sprawl in compute_evidence_hash()

Code quality and consistency:
- Standardize derive macro formatting to single-line across governance gates
  (regexp_string, controller_composition, tier_telemetry, vectorized_lane)
- Convert runtime assertions to compile-time const blocks in
  hardware_board_claim_gate and transfer_governance_gate
- Reformat method chains, Display impls, and assertion blocks for readability
  across adversarial_supremacy_synthesis, hostcall_session, metadata_locality,
  resource_certificate, translation_validation_receipt, react_module_graph
- Align configuration constant comments in resource_certificate_governance_gate

Test coverage expansion:
- 1000+ lines of new/expanded integration tests across superblock_formation,
  benchmark_coverage_saturation_gate, translation_validation_receipt,
  hardware_board_claim_gate, metadata_locality, regexp_string, and
  capability_escrow_adversarial test suites
- Update beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1144,27 +1144,30 @@ pub fn interop_parity_corpus() -> Vec<InteropSpecimen> {
 // Runner
 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
-/// Compute evidence hash from components.
-fn compute_evidence_hash(
-    specimen_id: &str,
+/// Input for computing an evidence hash.
+struct EvidenceHashInput<'a> {
+    specimen_id: &'a str,
     actual_outcome: InteropActualOutcome,
     compatibility_disposition: InteropCompatibilityDisposition,
-    guidance_code: &str,
+    guidance_code: &'a str,
     binding_count: usize,
     async_count: usize,
     linked_count: u64,
     cycle_count: u64,
-) -> String {
+}
+
+/// Compute evidence hash from components.
+fn compute_evidence_hash(input: &EvidenceHashInput<'_>) -> String {
     let hash_input = format!(
         "{}:{}:{}:{}:{}:{}:{}:{}",
-        specimen_id,
-        actual_outcome as u8,
-        compatibility_disposition as u8,
-        guidance_code,
-        binding_count,
-        async_count,
-        linked_count,
-        cycle_count,
+        input.specimen_id,
+        input.actual_outcome as u8,
+        input.compatibility_disposition as u8,
+        input.guidance_code,
+        input.binding_count,
+        input.async_count,
+        input.linked_count,
+        input.cycle_count,
     );
     hex_encode(ContentHash::compute(hash_input.as_bytes()).as_bytes())
 }

+            binding_count: 0,
+            async_count: 0,
             linked_count,
             cycle_count,
-        )),
+        })),
     }
 }
